description: Adds controllable noise to a still image or video frame batch. Four noise types are available: gaussian (normally-distributed additive noise, ideal for simulating film grain), salt_and_pepper (random black/white pixel speckle), uniform (flat-distribution additive noise), and fade (low-frequency smooth value noise for a large-scale grain effect). The monochrome flag applies a single-channel noise pattern to all colour channels, producing greyscale noise rather than coloured speckle.
